tool_args.label: South Brooklyn east-west corridor identified as priority
tool_args.raw_text: The Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study (2009) identified the south Brooklyn east-west corridor as a priority service need.

payload.claim_text: The Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study (2009) identified the south Brooklyn east-west corridor as a priority service need.
payload.subject: South Brooklyn east-west corridor
payload.description: Priority service need identified by BRT Phase II Study (2009)

tool_args.label: Seven SBS routes currently operating
tool_args.raw_text: There are seven SBS routes currently operating in NYC.

payload.claim_text: There are seven SBS routes currently operating in NYC.
payload.description: Number of operating SBS routes at time of the kick-off meeting (2015)

tool_args.label: SBS = package of improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Select Bus Service is New York City's brand name for a package of improvements that result in faster and more reliable service on high-ridership bus routes.

payload.claim_text: Select Bus Service is New York City's brand name for a package of improvements that result in faster and more reliable service on high-ridership bus routes.
payload.description: Definition of Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: Key issues raised at 2009 workshops
tool_args.raw_text: Key issues raised at the 2009 public workshops included: Bus trips are long and slow. Many parts of south Brooklyn are underserved by transit. A bus trip across south Brooklyn can take up to 2 hours.

payload.claim_text: Key issues raised at the 2009 public workshops included: Bus trips are long and slow. Many parts of south Brooklyn are underserved by transit. A bus trip across south Brooklyn can take up to 2 hours.
payload.subject: South Brooklyn transit
payload.description: Issues identified at 2009 public workshops for the BRT Phase II Study

tool_args.label: 9 subway routes run north-south in south Brooklyn
tool_args.raw_text: 9 subway routes serve south Brooklyn and mainly run North-South.

payload.claim_text: 9 subway routes serve south Brooklyn and mainly run North-South.
payload.subject: South Brooklyn subway service
payload.description: Subway service pattern in south Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Past goals of SBS projects
tool_args.raw_text: Past goals of SBS projects have included: Faster and more reliable bus service and better bus stops; Improve pedestrian and traffic safety; Improve or maintain traffic flow, parking, and loading space.

payload.claim_text: Past goals of SBS projects have included: Faster and more reliable bus service and better bus stops; Improve pedestrian and traffic safety; Improve or maintain traffic flow, parking, and loading space.
payload.subject: SBS projects
payload.description: Past goals of SBS projects referenced for the South Brooklyn Crosstown project

tool_args.label: Dedicated Bus Lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Dedicated Bus Lanes: Faster bus rides, Reduced traffic conflicts between buses and other traffic

payload.description: Dedicated bus lanes to provide faster bus rides and reduce traffic conflicts between buses and other traffic

tool_args.label: Signal Priority for Buses
tool_args.raw_text: Signal Priority for Buses: Buses spend less time stopped at red lights, More reliable bus service

payload.description: Signal priority for buses to reduce time stopped at red lights and provide more reliable bus service

tool_args.label: Off-Board Fare Collection
tool_args.raw_text: Off-Board Fare Collection: Quicker bus boarding

payload.description: Off-board fare collection for quicker bus boarding

tool_args.label: All-Door Boarding
tool_args.raw_text: All-Door Boarding: Buses spend less time waiting at bus stops

payload.description: All-door boarding so buses spend less time waiting at bus stops

tool_args.label: Improved Station Amenities
tool_args.raw_text: Improved Station Amenities: More attractive, appealing bus stops, More comfortable wait for the bus, Better information for riders

payload.description: More attractive appealing bus stops, more comfortable wait, and better rider information

tool_args.label: Real-Time Passenger Information
tool_args.raw_text: Real-Time Passenger Information
